_comment: Priority squares use the 3-digit MGRS easting/northing the kids read off the radio display (e.g. '017-284'). All defaults below are open water, west of the shipping channel, within sailing range of the Edgewood YC launch (square 013-284). Edit freely.

teams.name: Harbor Seals
teams.sector: northeast of launch, toward Fields Point reach

teams.name: Striped Bass
teams.sector: south of launch, toward Stillhouse Cove
